snp1.8:1.1: This is to be done by one skilled in aims
snp1.8:1.4: easy to instruct, gentle, & not conceited,
snp1.8:3.1: Do not do the slightest thing
snp1.8:3.2: that the observant would later censure.
snp1.8:3.4: may all beings be happy at heart.
snp1.8:5.4: May all beings be happy at heart.
snp1.8:7.1: As a mother would risk her life
snp1.8:7.2: to protect her child, her only child,
snp1.8:7.3: even so should one cultivate the heart limitlessly
snp1.8:8.1: With goodwill for the entire cosmos,
snp1.8:9.2: or lying down, as long as one has banished torpor,
snp1.8:9.3: one should be determined on this mindfulness.
snp1.8:9.4: This is called a Brahmā abiding here.
snp1.8:10.4: one never again will lie in the womb.
